name: floa
description: FLOA — the engine in src/, one folder per business in businesses/. build.mjs renders each business into its own site.
//imports: The engine's public surface. A business under businesses/ imports the shared
components, layouts and helpers through these names and NEVER through a
relative path — a business must not know how deep it sits, or where src/ is.
Node resolves them natively (package.json subpath imports); there is no
bundler and no build step behind this.
